keyPoints: Boundary conditions spanning self-assessment, source credibility, data-domain mismatch, and task-structure.
Constraint-based workflows with grounding, verification, abstention, and traceable confidence signals prototyped within a single project cycle.
Grounding in verifiable sources with citations and provenance attached to every claim.
Calibrated confidence signals and domain-aware evaluation metrics (e.g., Flex-ECE) for measuring trustworthiness.
Abstention gates and human-in-the-loop governance for high-stakes outputs.
Trade-offs between grounding depth, latency, and compute costs acknowledged in design choices.
